examples: These data suggest that nonenzymatic glycosylation of lens crystallins may contribute to cataract formation.
If a woman has certain infections during pregnancy, such as rubella or chickenpox, the baby may develop a cataract before birth.
Operation Cataract helped cut the backlog which was blamed on the Legionnaires' disease outbreak in Cumbria.
It's why the Prime Minister announced airline style booking systems for cancer and cataract services.
